data.title: ShipMonk opens two more fulfillment centers for ecommerce
data.description: The company has invested more than $3 million annually in research and development to integrate advanced automation and smart warehouse management systems.

data.title: AWS to invest another $1 billion in Ohio AI data centers
data.description: AWS has already made significant commitments to Ohio, with plans to invest $10 billion in data center infrastructure across the state by 2030.

data.title: RB Global enters acquisition deal with JM Wood Auction
data.description: RB Global CEO Jim Kessler said the acquisition will bring J.M. Wood’s experienced sales team and strong local relationships into the company’s operations, enhancing its service capabilities

data.title: Lowe's introduces its Mylow virtual adviser, built with OpenAI
data.description: Lowe's picked OpenAI to be part of its current rollout of shopper-targeted technology solutions, which also include Apple's Vision Pro headsets.

data.title: AB InBev reports strong annual ecommerce growth
data.description: A key factor behind AB InBev’s success was the expansion of its B2B ecommerce platform, BEES.
